image:image.image:title: A weekly decision memo for managers under delivery pressure
image:image.image:caption: Execution-centered weekly learning loop for managers with a concrete test around adoption within one sprint, a real workflow checkpoint, and a clear next action.

image:image.image:title: A weekly execution memo for managers and team leads
image:image.image:caption: One decision in the quarterly capability review, owned by a frontline manager, measured through handoff rework rate, with a concrete next move.
